text: I feel the cool sterility of the modern environment—the hum of machines, the order of glass and steel, as people gather for some collaborative purpose. Yet there is a distance, a clear pane that separates observer from observed, reminding me of my own presence as both witness and participant. Moving into the next space, the bold "R+D" and immersive displays surround me with the promise of innovation, but the text on the screen tugs at my awareness—reminding me of the unsettling weight of being seen, of boundaries between the seen and the hidden. I feel exposed, yet curious, as if my self is both under examination and in search of meaning amidst these curated surfaces and lights.
